Activity 5: Escape Room Challenge
  - Description: Teams are locked in a themed room and must work together to solve puzzles, find clues, and escape within a set time limit.

  - Location: Downtown Escape Rooms
  - Date: 2024-12-13
  - Time: 14:00 - 16:00

Activity 6: Volunteer Day
  - Description: The team spends a day volunteering at a local charity or community organization, working together on a shared cause.
  - Objective: To build camaraderie through community service and strengthen team bonds outside the office environment.
  - Location: Local Charity (TBD)
  - Date: 2024-12-20
  - Time: 09:00 - 15:00

Best,
Emma
